rows: Raychem Polymeric Surge Arrester Low Voltage Surge Arresters Safety and reliability are vital in energy industry and Raychem RPG's Energy Products Provide protection for LV Division is committed to pioneering overhead lines, consumer in-house improvements in performance at all levels. supplies, distribution tranformers and other applicances RRL's development teams work to generate a superior range of high performance products. All products are developed using Raychem’s extensive service experience, as per the international standards including IEC, IEEE, ANSI and many national standards. Raychem's polymeric surge arresters for voltage power distribution systems upto 800kV are designed to reliably protect your valuable assets from over voltage. They withstand severe outdoor exposure over long operating lifetime and help maintain service reliability in both overhead and underground installations. Raychem's polymeric surge arresters have passed the most rigorous tests (IEC 60099-4, ANSI C62.11, IEC 61643) High Voltage Advantages Surge Arresters For protection of transmission All our arrester are manufactured using systems up to 800 kV ZnO varistors, which display excellent thermal and current handling characteristics due to the guaranteed homogeneity of the varistor volume. This thermal behavior yields products with: • Excellent temporary overvoltage (TOV) Structure of performance • Safe, non-shattering failure in the Polymeric Surge Arrester short circuit test by pre-failing to higher fault currents • High energy handling capability Raychem's ZnO varistor disk has excellent electrical characterstics and thermal stability. The resulting new varistor has resulted in excellent energy handling and TOV performance

Medium Voltage Surge Arresters For indoor and outdoor applications, for protection of overhead lines, DC locomotives, switchgear applications and motor protection DA Series Corrosion resistant aluminium fittings Polymer housing ZnO (Zinc Oxide) Birdcap varistors Flame retardant FRP structure Surge arrester name plate Aluminium fittings Polymer housing ZnO varistros Glass filled epoxy laminate Bracket Disconnector ELD Earth clamp
